description: Create a gvSIG world basemap project saved to /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/organized_basemap.gvsproj. The project must feature a View named 'World Overview' containing three layers loaded from /home/ga/gvsig_data/: ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp (renamed to 'Countries'), ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp (renamed to 'Rivers'), and ne_110m_populated_places.shp (renamed to 'Cities'). Organize the layers such that 'Countries' and 'Rivers' are placed within a Layer Group named 'Physical Geography', while 'Cities' remains outside the group.
